CustomField.description: Calculates Age of Contact if 'Birthdate' is not blank
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT( ISBLANK( Birthdate__c ) ) , IF( DATE( 2000 , MONTH( Birthdate__c ) , DAY( Birthdate__c ) ) <= DATE( 2000 , MONTH( TODAY() ) , DAY( TODAY() ) ), YEAR (Today()) - YEAR ( Birthdate__c ), YEAR (Today()) - YEAR ( Birthdate__c ) -1 ), null)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculates Age of Contact if 'Birthdate' is not blank
CustomField.label: Dependent Age
